title: Best Skincare Routine for Kathmandu's Climate
excerpt: High altitude, pollution and temperature changes — build a routine that works for Nepal's unique environment.
body:
Understanding Kathmandu's Unique Climate

Kathmandu sits at 1,400 metres altitude with high UV exposure, dust pollution and dramatic seasonal changes. This combination demands a specific skincare approach.

Morning Routine

Start with a gentle cleanser, apply Vitamin C serum for UV protection, follow with SPF 50+ sunscreen. Our experts recommend Korean SPF formulations available at our clinic.

Evening Routine

Double cleanse to remove pollution particles, apply retinol serum 3x per week, finish with a rich moisturizer.

Book a skin consultation at Natural Beauty Clinic — 9843805588
author: Sushma Tamang
